item.title: tony_calvin: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 35min TODAY's statistics and info for Newbury and Ayr. Going, weather, watering (Ayr changed
item.description: Tony Calvin @tony_calvin · 35min TODAY's statistics and info for Newbury and Ayr. Going, weather, watering (Ayr changed to soft, heavy in places during racing yesterday and 3mm+ due this morning, so expect more NRs - BHA site is wrong); 1st-time headgear stats, pace maps and trainerform; De tips.akbets.co.uk 259
